title: Election Campaigns Intensify Across Salem
summary: Political parties have intensified their campaign efforts across Salem with rallies, public meetings, and door-to-door outreach. Leaders are focusing on key voter groups and local issues as the election date approaches, making Salem a highly active political zone.

title: Salem Emerges as Crucial Electoral Battleground
summary: Salem has emerged as an important electoral battleground due to its strategic voter base and political significance. Major parties are deploying senior leaders and resources to secure voter support in the district.

title: Residents Demand Better Road Infrastructure
summary: Residents in several parts of Salem have raised concerns over damaged roads and poor maintenance. They are urging authorities to take immediate steps to improve infrastructure and ensure safer commuting.

title: Steel Industry in Salem Shows Signs of Recovery
summary: The steel industry in Salem has shown positive signs of recovery with increased production and demand. Local industries are optimistic about continued growth in the coming months.

title: Heatwave Advisory Issued in Salem
summary: Authorities have issued a heatwave advisory as temperatures rise across Salem. Residents are advised to stay hydrated and avoid outdoor activities during peak hours.

title: Special Buses Arranged for Election Duty
summary: Transport authorities have arranged special buses to manage increased travel demand and facilitate election duties across Salem district.

title: Police Tighten Security Ahead of Elections
summary: Police have stepped up security arrangements with increased patrols and surveillance to ensure peaceful elections in Salem.

title: Vegetable Prices Rise in Salem Markets
summary: Vegetable prices in Salem markets have increased due to supply shortages, affecting daily household expenses.

title: Salem Remains EPS Territory but DMK Pushing Harder than 2021
summary: Reporting from district shows AIADMK trying to retain fortress while DMK uses ministers and local organisers to expand ground network. Result is sharper, more personal contest shaping wider western Tamil Nadu mood.

title: TVK Faces Field Friction in Western Belt
summary: Party changed candidates in Salem's Edappadi after scrutiny rejection. Setbacks show new entrant still lacks stable organisational footing in parts of Kongu.

title: Sensitive Booths and Webcasting Major Election-Management Story
summary: Officials identified 172 sensitive polling stations across 11 constituencies placed under live surveillance. Scale of monitoring reflects administration's concern about intimidation, money power, and booth-level disputes.

title: Salem Election Machinery Running Under Unusually Tight Scrutiny
summary: Booths under webcasting while officials deal with candidate scrutiny disputes and campaign-related misconduct complaints. Salem is one of clearest examples of how administration and politics now overlap at booth level.

title: Yercaud Hills Face Rain-Linked Transport Disruption
summary: Heavy rain brought road restrictions on Yercaud route showing how quickly weather affects mobility and tourism. For residents, monsoon management remains practical governance test.

title: Erode's Political Messaging Increasingly Personal and Community-Focused
summary: Sengottaiyan's comments on Vijay, separate district demands, and alliance loyalty show how public opinion is pulled by identity not ideology. Party loyalty now competes with local pride and generational change.
